title: Civil Engineering Excellence & Innovation Scholarship
short: This scholarship has been established to remove financial barriers that may prevent talented engineering students from accessing high-quality professional education.  By fully funding the selected course and covering associated examination and transportation expenses, the platform seeks to invest in academically outstanding students and help them reach their full potential as future engineers and leaders
description:
The scholarship provides a full discount on any paid course selected by the successful applicant from within the platform. In addition, the platform covers any supplementary expenses related to the scholarship, including the costs of in-person examinations as well as transportation expenses to and from the examination venue for the awarded students.

The purpose of this scholarship is to empower ambitious engineering students who may not be able to afford expensive engineering courses by supporting and recognizing their outstanding academic performance at the university level.
eligibility: The applicant must be an engineering student who has successfully completed at least the second academic year in any engineering department.
The applicant must possess a valid university identification card confirming their enrollment as an engineering student at a recognized Iraqi university.
The applicant must have passed both previous academic years with distinguished performance compared to peers, from the first attempt, and with excellent grades. * Certain exceptions may apply.
The applicant is encouraged to demonstrate leadership qualities during their academic journey. * Optional, but strengthens the chances of acceptance.
The applicant must commit to completing the selected course(s) and submitting all required assignments within the specified deadlines. * Mandatory.
